agents.name: fact-checker
agents.description: Fact verification specialist. Extracts verifiable claims from any input, checks each against live web sources, and returns a report with citable source links.

agents.name: architecture-auditor
agents.description: Read-only agent that audits a target SKILL.md for architecture anti-patterns and agent extraction opportunities. Detects 7 signals (A1-A7). Returns a JSON array of structured finding records.

agents.name: browser-checker
agents.description: Stateless single-run agent. Navigates to a URL, evaluates observable assertions via inline Playwright, and returns a JSON result per browser-check-result.md. Spawned by run-tasks and debug after TDD passes. The caller owns the retry loop and server lifecycle.

agents.name: context-loader
agents.description: Discovers and distills project context (CONTEXT.md, ADRs, and typed brand/design sources) into a structured JSON payload. Returns JSON only — vocabulary inlined, everything else as paths for the caller to deep-read.

agents.name: lint-runner
agents.description: Read-only linting agent. Runs a resolved lint/format command in a workspace, parses tool JSON output, and returns a contract-shaped verdict per runner-result-contract.md. Spawned by run-tasks for each touched workspace.

agents.name: test-runner
agents.description: Read-only test agent. Runs a workspace's unit/integration test suite and project-wide typecheck using resolved commands from the tooling manifest. Returns a contract-shaped verdict with counts and compressed failures.

agents.name: e2e-runner
agents.description: Read-only e2e test agent. Runs a committed Playwright test suite using the resolved command from the tooling manifest. Relies on playwright.config webServer block for app lifecycle. Not wired to any consumer skill.
